focus: CocoIndex Python subsystem — embedder config, reranker drift, chunking/scoring defaults, inline fallbacks. Cross-check vs May 2026 cocoindex arc ADRs (nomic-CodeRankEmbed + Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B promotion). Registry pattern conformance assessment.
